prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名近年约第124–131名，2026年升至 第125名，排名稳定中略升；2026年声誉评价为「一般」（抖音热度排名第105，综合热度59346），无明显正面或负面舆情；未见投档断档记录，报考心理平稳；应用经济学A-为唯一A类学科，与物理类招生专业中金融学类、经济统计学、数字经济等有一定关联，但物理类主力专业（计算机、电子信息、微电子等）无 对应A类学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程（高热推荐）等物理类热门专业持续升温；本省2026年考生总数约53 .5万，按近年物理类占比约62%估算约33.2万人，较2025年物理类28.5万人明显增加，竞争加剧；辽宁大学位于东北沈阳，对四川考生属跨省远距 离报考，地域吸引力一般；该校在本省（辽宁）招生占比约20%–25%，在四川招生占比相对较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次38996名、2026年微扩约3.7%（缓解竞争有 限）、本省物理类考生明显增加（加剧竞争）及物理类热门专业持续升温等因素，考生增加效应大于微扩效应，预计位次继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约39900名，区间38500–413 00名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 23592 → 23215 → 28248 → 38996, with a continuous backward shift over the past three years, accumulating a shift of about 15700 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 38996; the provincial enrollment plan was 18 in 2022 → 15 in 2023 → 16 in 2024 → 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, a slight expansion of about 3.7% compared to 2025, with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 124–131, rising to 125th in 2026, stable with a slight increase; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'average' (Douyin popularity ranking 105th, comprehensive heat 59346), with no significant positive or negative public opinion; no record of enrollment gaps, stable application psychology; Applied Economics A- is the only A-class discipline, which has some connection with finance, economic statistics, digital economy, etc., among the physics category enrollment majors, but the main physics category majors (computer science, electronic information, microelectronics, etc.) have no corresponding A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science (highly recommended), electronic information/communication (highly recommended), electrical engineering (highly recommended) and other popular physics category majors continue to heat up; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, with an estimated 332,000 in the physics category based on the recent proportion of about 62%, a significant increase from 285,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Northeast China, which is a long-distance cross-province application for Sichuan candidates, with average regional appeal; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Liaoning) is about 20%–25%, with a relatively small proportion in Sichuan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 38996, a slight expansion of about 3.7% in 2026 (limited relief of competition), a significant increase in physics category candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the continued heating up of popular physics category majors, the effect of candidate increase outweighs the effect of slight expansion, and the ranking is expected to continue to shift slightly backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 39900, with a range of 38500–41300.
